title: Tyler Technologies Acquires ResourceX
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has acquired ResourceX.

title: Tyler Technologies Acquires ARInspect
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has acquired ARInspect.

title: Tyler's (TYL) Workforce Case Management System Chosen by NGB
text: Tyler (TYL) announces that its Workforce Case Management application suite has been selected by the NGB to set up a complaint tracking and program management system.

title: Naperville, Illinois Police Department Partners with Tyler Technologies for Integrated Public Safety Solutions
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies signed an agreement with the Naperville Police Department in Illinois for Tyler's Enterprise Public Safety suite.

title: U.S. National Guard Bureau Selects Tyler Technologies' Solution Suite for Complaint Tracking and Program Management
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it has signed a contract with the U.S. National Guard Bureau for Tyler's Workforce Case Management application suite.

title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Tyler Technologies' (TYL) Q3 performance is expected to have benefited from the demand for SaaS solutions as the public sector continues to transition from on-premise to cloud-based systems.

title: Tyler Technologies to Participate in November and December Investor Conferences
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies will participate in six investor conferences in November and December 2023.

title: Tyler Technologies Schedules Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies schedules its third quarter 2023 earnings conference call and webcast for November 2, 2023.

title: Earnings Preview: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Tyler Technologies State Partners Receive 2023 Government Experience Awards from the Center for Digital Government
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that its Iowa and Kentucky state partners have won 2023 Project Experience Awards.

title: Tyler Technologies Named a Best Place to Work in Maine
text: YARMOUTH, Maine--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has been recognized as one of the 2023 Best Places to Work in Maine.

title: Tyler's (TYL) Community Readiness Chosen by Sumner County
text: Tyler's (TYL) Community Readiness solution is likely to help the Sumner County Sheriff's Office bridge the gap between the jail and the community by connecting incarcerated individuals to verified social care providers.

title: Sumner County, Tennessee, Goes Live with Tyler Technologies' Community Readiness Solution to Reduce Recidivism
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the Sumner County Sheriff's Office in Tennessee has successfully gone live with Tyler's Community Readiness solution.

title: Tyler Technologies' (TYL) Solutions Find New Client in Virginia
text: Augusta County and Augusta County Public Schools in Virginia select Tyler Technologies' (TYL) Enterprise ERP and EPL solutions to streamline operations and improve community services.

title: Tyler Technologies to Provide Enterprise Resource Planning and Civic Solutions to Augusta County & Schools in Virginia
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it has signed an agreement with Augusta County, Virginia, for Tyler's ERP and Civic solutions.
